scope_signal.description: Operator's bias on scope this turn

outcome_ref.description: commit sha, PR url, or null

operator_overrode_agent.description: True when this prompt contradicts the prior agent proposal — highest signal field for twin training

agent_proposal_summary.description: Brief recap of what the agent suggested before the override

tokens_in.description: input_tokens from last assistant record's message.usage in this hook's transcript tail. Null when transcript unavailable or usage absent. Added v0.6.0 (additive).

tokens_cache_read.description: cache_read_input_tokens. Priced at ~10% of input rate; needed for accurate cost estimation. Added v0.6.0 (additive).

tokens_cache_create.description: cache_creation_input_tokens. Priced at ~125% of input rate; material cost component for long-context sessions. Added v0.6.0 (additive).

model.description: Model identifier from message.model (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'). Added v0.6.0 (additive).

transcript_path.description: Full transcript path; null when privacy.store_full_paths = false

transcript_hash.description: SHA-256(transcript_path lowercased) truncated to 16 hex chars

transcript_tail.description: Last N path segments of transcript_path (config.privacy.path_segments_kept)

cwd.description: Full cwd; null when privacy.store_full_paths = false

is_home_project.description: True when cwd lives under config.weighting.home_project_path

project_weight.description: Training-time weight: home_weight for active dev project, other_weight (or per-project override) for drive-bys

classifier_version.description: Version of the classifier that produced this structured record

persona_version.description: Version of profile/persona.md active when this record was classified

operator_decision_delta.description: When operator overrode agent: short delta string capturing what changed (axis + direction)

override_axis.description: Which decision axis the operator overrode on

retrieval_text.description: Compact text used for embedding/retrieval; concatenation of category, decision, rationale

embedding.description: vector for retrieval; null if not yet computed
